student.title: Student
student.description: Information about a student registered at SMAN 1 Cililin

nisn.description: Student National Identification Number (Nomor Induk Siswa Nasional)

userId.description: Owner user ID of this student record

attendanceSession.title: Attendance Session
attendanceSession.description: Attendance list and statuses for a specific class on a specific date

id.description: Unique session identifier formatted as date_class

date.description: The date of the attendance check in YYYY-MM-DD format

records.description: Map of student IDs to their attendance status

userId.description: Owner user ID of this attendance session

user.title: User
user.description: Information about a registered system user

photoURL.description: Base64 encoded avatar image of the user

custom_account.title: Custom Account
custom_account.description: Shared directory record to support credential recovery and custom database connection logic

username.description: Email identifier used for authentication login

password.description: Plaintext recovery copy of password strictly for forgot account visual lookups

configText.description: Raw string Firebase web configurations script or JSON

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this account registration occurred

/attendanceSessions/{sessionId}.description: Collection of attendance sessions and checks for classrooms

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user preferences and bios

/custom_accounts/{accountId}.description: Collection mapping usernames to custom Firebase parameters and user lookups
